images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a long wall of identical dormant alarm bells receding into shadow, a few covered in fine dust; one single bell rings vividly, caught mid-vibration with motion lines, while an engineer in the foreground walks past without turning to look — trained by years of false alarms not to hear it. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent on the one ringing bell only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
